package.title: Premium Family — Munnar, Thekkady & Alleppey Houseboat

highlights.text: Emerald Munnar tea plantations and mist-clad Western Ghats panoramas
Exclusive spice plantation walk and Kathakali cultural evening in Thekkady
Private ultra-luxury Alleppey houseboat cruise on Vembanad Lake with full board
Fort Kochi heritage circuit — Chinese Fishing Nets, Jew Town & Dutch Palace
Cheeyappara and Valara waterfall stops en route to Munnar
Private Innova Crysta with TRAGUIN 24/7 family concierge throughout

itinerary.title: Premium Family — Munnar, Thekkady & Alleppey Houseboat
itinerary.tagline: Paradise Found — A Premium Family Journey Through Kerala
itinerary.overview: Immerse your family in the timeless magic of God's Own Country on TRAGUIN's definitive Kerala escape — from emerald tea slopes in Munnar and spice sanctuaries in Thekkady to a private Alleppey houseboat and Fort Kochi heritage. This premium curated journey weaves together breathtaking landscapes, handpicked resorts, and seamless private chauffeur comfort.
itinerary.seo_title: KL-001 | Premium Family Kerala | TRAGUIN Munnar Thekkady Alleppey Tour
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 05 Nights / 06 Days Kerala family package (KL-001) covering Munnar tea valleys, Thekkady spice plantations, Alleppey houseboat, and Fort Kochi with premium stays and private transfers.

days.title: Cochin to Munnar — Ascent to the Emerald Hills
days.description: Your luxury Kerala holiday commences with a warm, personalized reception upon your arrival at Cochin International Airport or Railway Station. Your dedicated TRAGUIN professional chauffeur greets your family and assists with luggage before you step into your executive premium vehicle. Bid farewell to the urban coastal plains as you begin a scenic, winding ascent toward Munnar, the crown jewel of the Western Ghats. En route, pause at the spectacular Cheeyappara Waterfalls cascading down a seven-tiered rock face, and pass Valara Waterfalls embraced by dense forests before checking into your handpicked ultra-luxury resort overlooking cloud-kissed ridges.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Cheeyappara Waterfalls, Valara Waterfalls, Panoramic Mountain Passes, Scenic Photo Points
Evening Experience: Leisurely walks around the premium resort estate or enjoying authentic Nilgiri tea amidst the evening mist
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Premium / Handpicked Luxury Resort)
Meals Included: Welcome Drink & Gourmet Buffet Dinner

days.title: Munnar Sightseeing — Valleys of Velvet Tea
days.description: Awaken to a misty morning and indulge in an opulent breakfast before embarking on a comprehensive premium Munnar sightseeing tour. Visit the iconic Mattupetty Dam and reservoir, continue to Echo Point where voices resonate across the lake, wander through Kundala Lake, and tour the historic Tata Tea Museum. If conditions permit, visit Eravikulam National Park (Rajamalai), the sacred sanctuary of the endangered Nilgiri Tahr.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mattupetty Dam, Echo Point, Kundala Lake, Tea Museum, Photo Gardens, Eravikulam National Park
Optional Activities: Speed-boating at Mattupetty, paddle-boating on Kundala Lake, or shopping for rare exotic oils
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Premium / Handpicked Luxury Resort)
Meals Included: Sumptuous Breakfast & Elegant Dinner

days.title: Munnar to Thekkady — Heartland of Spices
days.description: Following a rich breakfast, check out of Munnar and chart a southerly path through spice-laden hills to Thekkady (Periyar). Arrive at your premium boutique resort and join an exclusive guided Spice Plantation Tour. As twilight falls, witness a breathtaking Kathakali performance or Kalaripayattu martial arts show at a cultural center.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Spice Plantation Walk, Periyar Wilderness Outskirts, High-Range Viewpoints
Evening Experience: Live traditional Kathakali performance & vibrant Kalaripayattu martial arts show
Overnight Stay: Thekkady (Premium Wilderness Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast & Multi-cuisine Buffet Dinner

days.title: Thekkady to Alleppey — Ultimate Houseboat Cruise
days.description: Savor an early breakfast before departing for the pristine backwaters of Alleppey. Step aboard your private ultra-luxury TRAGUIN houseboat at noon. Glide onto Vembanad Lake as your onboard chef prepares authentic lunch featuring Karimeen Pollichathu. Watch the dramatic sunset before anchoring for a peaceful night under the stars.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Vembanad Lake, Alleppey Backwater Canals, Remote Riverine Islands, Paddy Field Vistas
Optional Activities: Ayurvedic rejuvenation massage at a premium backwater spa during brief canal stops
Overnight Stay: Alleppey (Private Luxury Air-Conditioned Houseboat — Anchored)
Meals Included: Full Board — Traditional Lunch, High Tea, Dinner, and Breakfast cooked fresh onboard

days.title: Alleppey to Cochin — Colonial Echoes of Fort Kochi
days.description: Enjoy breakfast on the houseboat deck as it cruises back to the mainland jetty. Disembark and travel to Cochin to explore Fort Kochi — the Chinese Fishing Nets, St. Francis Church, Jew Town, Paradesi Synagogue, and Mattancherry Dutch Palace.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Fort Kochi Beach, Chinese Fishing Nets, St. Francis Church, Santa Cruz Basilica, Mattancherry Dutch Palace, Jew Town
Evening Experience: Leisurely café hopping in Fort Kochi or walking along Marine Drive promenade
Overnight Stay: Cochin (Premium / Ultra-Luxury Heritage Hotel)
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast & Farewell Dinner

days.title: Departure from Cochin
days.description: Your exceptional TRAGUIN Kerala Package concludes today. Indulge in a final luxurious buffet breakfast and enjoy relaxed leisure time for last-minute shopping for tea leaves, organic spices, banana chips, or Kerala handloom garments before your private transfer to Cochin International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Lulu Mall (optional) or local Cochin markets for souvenir shopping
Evening Experience: TRAGUIN farewell assistance and seamless airport check-in coordination
Overnight Stay: Not Applicable (Departure Day)
Meals Included: Grand Institutional Breakfast

hotels.description: Ultra Luxury stay in Alleppey Houseboat.

inclusions.text: Premium accommodation at handpicked Kerala resorts, heritage hotels, and luxury houseboats
Daily lavish breakfasts and authentic Kerala multi-cuisine dinners (MAPAI plan)
Private chauffeur-driven AC Innova Crysta for all transfers, hill stations, and sightseeing
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated elite guest relationship manager assistance
Personalized welcome kit with herbal tea, fresh fruits, mineral water, and houseboat transfers where applicable
Driver allowances, tolls, parking, fuel, and applicable taxes
05 nights premium accommodation across Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey houseboat, and Cochin
Guided spice plantation walk and cultural evening show entry tickets
Airfare or train tickets to and from Cochin, Trivandrum, or Calicut gateway
Monument entry tickets, national park fees, camera fees, and optional guide gratuities
Optional activities such as speed-boating, elephant safaris, adventure sports, and spa therapies beyond included tier
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, alcoholic beverages, and tipping
